name: Brefeldin A
description: A metabolite from Penicillium brefeldianum that exhibits a wide range of antibiotic activity.

interactions.name: Cisapride
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cisapride can be increased when it is combined with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: Progesterone
interactions.description: The absorption of Progesterone can be decreased when combined with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: Dofetilide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Dofetilide can be increased when it is combined with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: Quinidine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Quinidine can be increased when it is combined with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: Ranolazine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ranolazine can be increased when it is combined with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: Buspirone
interactions.description: The metabolism of Buspirone can be decreased when combined with Brefeldin A.

interactions.name: Didanosine
interactions.description: Didanosine can cause a decrease in the absorption of Brefeldin A resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.

interactions.name: Cyclosporine
